ui_assets.prompt:
Use the provided image as the exact style and silhouette reference. Create a four-state UI button plate sheet for the same long black brass framed command plate.

There are four separate horizontal plates arranged vertically: normal, hover, pressed, and disabled. Keep all four plates the same long horizontal shape, same proportions, same dark empty center, same thin muted brass double border, same clipped stepped pixel corners, and same overall silhouette.

Normal: match the provided reference closely.
Hover: slightly brighter and cleaner brass edge with a very subtle pale gold highlight.
Pressed: slightly darker inset center, reduced top highlight, compressed lower edge.
Disabled: darker, desaturated, lower contrast, dull gray-brown brass, no active highlight.

Each plate must remain blank with an almost black empty center so game text can be added later in Godot.

Do not change the shape between states. Do not make them rounded or chunky. Do not add text, numbers, icons, symbols, characters, labels, or extra decoration.

Transparent background. Single crop-ready UI state sheet. Refined 16/32-bit pixel art. Dark dungeon management interface, premium black metal panel, thin brass trim, restrained and clean.
